name: ERPNext Documentation (docs.frappe.io/erpnext)
topic: ERPNext user manual: all business modules (Accounting, Stock, Selling, Buying, CRM, Manufacturing, Assets, Projects, Support, Quality, HR/Payroll, POS)
whatLearned: Canonical user-facing docs. The legacy docs.erpnext.com host now 301-redirects to docs.frappe.io/erpnext. Module landing pages are high-level; deep concept pages (chart-of-accounts, accounting-reports, asset, workflows) are detailed and authoritative.

name: Frappe Framework Documentation
topic: Platform layer: DocType model, fields, controllers, workflow, permissions, REST API, naming series, customization
whatLearned: Authoritative platform documentation. Defines DocType -> tabDoctype table mapping, docstatus model, role/permission model, REST conventions. Older frappeframework.com URLs redirect here.

name: Frappe REST API reference
topic: Auto-generated REST API: /api/resource/{doctype}, /api/method/{path}, auth (token api_key:api_secret, password/session, OAuth bearer), query params
whatLearned: All CRUD over /api/resource. GET list (fields, filters, or_filters, order_by, limit_start, limit_page_length), GET single by name, POST create, PUT update (partial), DELETE. Whitelisted Python methods via /api/method/{dotted.path}. Responses wrap payload in 'data' or 'message'; errors carry 'exc'/'exc_type'.

name: Frappe Document API
topic: Server-side document API (frappe.get_doc, get_list, get_all, db.get_value, insert, save, submit, cancel)
whatLearned: Server-side ORM-like API. submit() sets docstatus=1, cancel() sets docstatus=2; insert/save validate hooks. Underpins the REST resource layer.

name: Frappe Users and Permissions
topic: Role-based permissions, permission levels, user permissions, perm types (read/write/create/delete/submit/cancel/amend/report/export/import/share/print/email)
whatLearned: Roles map to DocType perms; permlevel groups fields for field-level control (default 0); User Permissions restrict by link-field value; auto roles Guest/All/Administrator/Desk User. Role Permissions Manager is the admin UI.

name: Frappe/ERPNext Workflow docs
topic: Workflow doctype, Workflow State, Workflow Action, transitions, allowed roles, conditions, multi-level approval
whatLearned: Workflow drives a document through states via actions gated by role; transitions can carry conditions (e.g. grand_total threshold). States can map document docstatus (0/1/2). Email notifications sent for next available actions.

name: Frappe DocType basics
topic: DocType as core building block: model+view, JSON definition, tab{Name} table, child/single/virtual doctypes, naming
whatLearned: Each DocType is JSON metadata that generates a tab{DocType} SQL table. Auto List/Form views. Variants: normal, Child (embedded rows), Single (one record stored in tabSingles), Virtual (no table).

name: ERPNext Chart of Accounts docs
topic: Account tree, root types (Asset/Liability/Income/Expense/Equity), group vs ledger, account numbering, statement mapping
whatLearned: CoA is a hierarchical tree; only leaf (non-group) ledger accounts accept postings. 20+ specialized account_type values (Bank, Receivable, Payable, Tax, Depreciation...). Balance Sheet from Asset/Liability/Equity; P&L from Income/Expense.

name: ERPNext Accounting Reports docs
topic: General Ledger, Trial Balance, Balance Sheet, Profit and Loss, Cash Flow, Accounts Receivable/Payable, ageing
whatLearned: Core financial reports are filterable by account/cost center/party/project/period/finance book. AR/AP provide ageing buckets.

name: ERPNext Asset module docs
topic: Asset, Asset Category, Asset Location, depreciation methods, maintenance, movement, capitalization
whatLearned: Depreciation methods: Straight Line, Written Down Value, Double Declining Balance, Manual. Auto-create assets on Purchase Receipt. Depreciation schedule posts Journal Entries. Asset Movement transfers location/custodian.

name: ERPNext GitHub repository (frappe/erpnext)
topic: Source layout, license (GPL-3.0), module directories, tech stack
whatLearned: GPL-3.0. ~77% Python, ~15% JS, ~5% TS. Modules as top-level packages under erpnext/ (accounts, stock, selling, buying, manufacturing, crm, projects, support, assets, quality_management, regional, setup, controllers). Built on Frappe Framework + Frappe UI (Vue).

name: Frappe Framework GitHub repository (frappe/frappe)
topic: Platform source: DocType engine, ORM, REST, workflow, permissions, naming, reports, print formats
whatLearned: MIT-licensed metadata-driven framework. Implements docstatus, workflow engine, role/permission engine, report types (Query/Script/Report Builder), Print Format engine, Data Import.

name: Frappe HR docs (frappehr)
topic: HR/Payroll now a separate Frappe HR app (split out of ERPNext in v14): Employee, Attendance, Leave, Salary Structure, Salary Slip, Payroll Entry, Expense Claim, Appraisal
whatLearned: HR & Payroll were extracted from ERPNext core into the standalone Frappe HR (hrms) app around v14. 13+ modules covering employee lifecycle, attendance/leave, payroll/taxation, expenses, performance. Integrates with ERPNext accounting.

name: ERPNext Manufacturing docs
topic: BOM, Work Order, Job Card, Production Plan, Workstation, Operation, Routing
whatLearned: BOM defines components/raw materials; Work Order executes a BOM; Job Card tracks per-operation work at a Workstation; Production Plan drives material/demand planning.

name: ERPNext Stock module docs
topic: Inventory: items, warehouses, stock transactions, reconciliation, valuation, reports
whatLearned: Stock module covers item management, warehouse-level inventory, stock entries/receipts/deliveries/transfers, reconciliation, and valuation. Stock Ledger Entry is the underlying ledger (confirmed via report/concept docs).

name: ERPNext Selling module docs
topic: Quotation -> Sales Order -> Delivery Note -> Sales Invoice; Customer, Price List, Pricing Rule, Product Bundle
whatLearned: Sales lifecycle with Customer master, Price List, Pricing Rule, Product Bundle. Confirms order-to-cash document chain.

name: ERPNext Buying module docs
topic: Material Request -> RFQ -> Supplier Quotation -> Purchase Order -> Purchase Receipt -> Purchase Invoice; Supplier
whatLearned: Procure-to-pay chain with Supplier master, RFQ comparison, Purchase Orders, receipts and invoices.

name: ERPNext CRM module docs
topic: Lead, Opportunity, Customer, Contact, sales funnel, activities, campaign
whatLearned: Lead capture/nurture, Opportunity tracking with forecasting, customer profiles, activity scheduling. (Note: there is also a separate standalone Frappe CRM app; ERPNext retains its own CRM module.)

name: ERPNext version 15 / product pages
topic: Marketing-level module list and version feature notes
whatLearned: Confirms official module taxonomy: Accounting, Procurement (Buying), Sales (Selling), CRM, Stock, Manufacturing, Projects, Assets, POS, Quality, Support, HR & Payroll. Marketing framing rather than technical depth.
